path: Problem: Sum values for a category within a custom day window (non-midnight 24-hour boundary) and allow copying across columns via header-driven criteria
Action: SUMPRODUCT with multiple boolean criteria (category match + datetime between start/end) using header cell as the category selector

Observation: When date and time are stored separately, adding them creates a comparable datetime serial that can be filtered with >= and > boundaries; using a header reference makes the formula horizontally fillable
Problem: Compute windowed totals using cumulative subtraction (sum through end boundary minus sum beyond end boundary) to isolate a 24-hour slice
Action: Two SUMPRODUCT calculations subtracted: (>= start) minus (> end) to yield values within [start, end]

Observation: Subtracting the cumulative sum after the end boundary removes all later transactions, leaving only those between the start and end; using > for the end avoids double-counting boundary timestamps
Problem: Use the next row’s date as the end boundary and suppress calculation on the last row when no next date exists
Action: IF/IFERROR gate around the window calculation, testing whether [NextRowDate] is nonblank (or numeric) before evaluating
Observation: Referencing the next row provides a dynamic end date per row; guarding prevents invalid end boundaries and avoids returning misleading totals on the final date
Problem: Change number format of a target range from Accounting to Currency
Action: Apply Currency number format to the specified range via Format Cells (or Home > Number > Currency)
Observation: Formatting is independent of the calculation logic and can be applied after formulas are in place without affecting results
